title: [codereview-pass1] add_route delegation uses 1-element path from nexthop only; full DAO path from rebuild_routes not used for multi-hop
description: In gateway.rs:95 the &[nexthop] does not capture full assembled path from assemble_path. For 2+ hop routes the RoutingTable will have incomplete path. P1 correctness. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-fy9q
close_reason: Fixed add_route to use full assembled DAO path from rebuild_routes not just nexthop; conventions followed from all impls (Rust/Python/C); forwarding and deaddrop_post fixes included; full lint/test/build verification passed; no test mods
